dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noReviews: No reviews yet. Start your first review!

projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyHint: No projects yet. Add a local git repository to get started.
projects.notGitRepo: Selected directory is not a git repository.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete this project and all its reviews?
projects.cloning: Cloning repository, this may take a moment...
projects.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo)
projects.authError:
Authentication required. Configure git credentials first:
1. Open Terminal
2. Run: git config --global credential.helper store
3. Clone the repo manually once to save credentials
4. Then add it here
projects.timeoutError: Connection timeout. This repository may require authentication or be unreachable. Please configure git credentials if it's a private repository.
projects.repoNotFound: Repository not found. Please check the URL.
projects.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
projects.remoteHint: For private repositories, select an authentication method above
projects.githubTokenHint: Generate at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens
projects.gitlabTokenHint: Generate at GitLab → Preferences → Access Tokens
